name: SquadSpell
description: Open SquadSpell in its own window. Defaults to local word list (no Google Fonts). Optional web dictionary if you enable it in-game.

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-forms allow-popups allow-modals; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; child-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.dictionaryapi.dev http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*
